alter table __FNC_BudgetAllocationCompany
add LastResetTime datetime null,
LastResetUserId int null,
LastUnResetTime datetime null,
LastUnResetUserId int null,
LastFreezeTime datetime null,
LastFreezeUserId int null,
LastUnFreezeTime datetime null,
LastUnFreezeUserId int null

alter table __FNC_BudgetAllocationDepartment
add LastFreezeTime DATETIME null,
LastFreezeUserId int null,
LastResetTime DATETIME null, 
LastResetUserId int null, 
LastUnFreezeTime DATETIME null, 
LastUnFreezeUserId int null,
LastUnResetTime DATETIME null, 
LastUnResetUserId int null 



alter table __FNC_BudgetAllocationUser
add LastFreezeTime DATETIME null,
LastFreezeUserId int null,

LastResetUserId int null, 
LastUnFreezeTime DATETIME null,
